content_html:
In war-torn Portland? Watch me speak at BSidesPDX!

frog brigade, from yesterday's No Kings protest

I'll be giving the Saturday morning keynote at BSidesPDX next weekend in beautiful Portland, Oregon.

I'm still putting the final touches on my talk, but it will largely be about the new American technofascist reality of mercenary spyware, device searches, and app censorship, with a focus on practical ways to defend ourselves and our communities.

Stay safe, and see you there!
